description_long: This is a standard orange traffic cone with a wide, square base and a tall, conical body. The cone features two broad, white reflective stripes encircling its upper and middle sections, which are partially faded and stained, indicating outdoor use. The surface of the cone is visibly dirty, with dark smudges, scuffs, and signs of wear, especially near the base and lower cone. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, matching the orange color of the rest of the body. The base is flat, thick, and slightly beveled at the edges, providing stability and resistance to tipping. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any side of the cone.
description: A worn orange traffic cone with two white reflective stripes, a rounded tip, and a wide, dirty square base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cone's orange body, two white reflective stripes, and significant dirt and scuff marks, especially on the lower half.
description_view_1: Side view with visible fading and dirt on the stripes and base, and a slightly different pattern of wear compared to other views.
description_view_2: Another side view highlighting the cone's square base and the even distribution of grime and wear along the cone's surface.
description_view_3: Rear view with the most pronounced dirt and scuffing on the base, and clear visibility of both reflective stripes.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal, white reflective stripes encircle the cone, one near the top and one at mid-height. Both stripes are approximately equal in width and show signs of fading and dirt.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, flat, and thick, made of the same orange plastic as the cone, with visible dirt and scuff marks. It is slightly beveled at the edges for stability.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with visible scuffs, fading, and grime, especially on the base and lower cone.
